nodes.itemHTML: • Kazoo - Carrier-grade VoIP API platform using FreeSWITCH and Kamailio.
• Open WebRTC Toolkit - WebRTC development toolkit with bindings for multiple platforms.
• OpenSIPS Summit - Meeting place for the OpenSIPS community.
• SEMSstars132 - Open source media and application server for SIP based VoIP services.
• FreeSWITCH - Open source multi-protocol, cross-platform and software switch.
• Asterisk - PBX framework supporting multiple protocols and platforms.
• Kamailio - Open source SIP server widely deployed by carriers and providers. Formerly known as OpenSER.
• OpenSIPS - Open source SIP server, tracing its roots in OpenSER (presently Kamailio).
• Routr - Lightweight SIP proxy, location server, and registrar written in Node.js.
• Sippy B2BUAstars139 - Back-to-back user agent server written in Python.
• Janus - Lightweight open source, general purpose, WebRTC gateway.
• RTPProxy - General purpose high performance RTP proxy.
• RTP:Enginestars599 - RTP and UDP based media traffic proxy, usable as a kernel module.
• mediasoup - Specialized WebRTC conferencing system.
• coturnstars8.3k - Fully featured TURN/STUN server supporting multiple platforms.
• STUNTMANstars1.2k - RFC compliant open source STUN implementation.
• sngrepstars779 - Terminal based SIP flow viewer.
• sipgrepstars146 - Console tool for sniffing, capturing and exploring SIP traffic.
• rtpbreakstars11 - Detect, reconstruct and analyze RTP sessions.
• HOMERstars1.2k - Multi-protocol capturing and monitoring framework for RTC.
• Trickle ICE - Exposes client-side NAT traversal debug data.
• SIPp - Traffic generator for the SIP protocol.
• SIPViciousstars684 - Suite of security tools that can be used to audit SIP based VoIP systems.
• sipsakstars98 - SIP stress and diagnostics utility.
• FusionPBX - Multitenant system built on top of FreeSWITCH.
• FreePBX - Web Manager for Asterisk.
• CGRateS - Carrier grade open source billing/rating server.
• A2Billing - Billing system for Asterisk for multiple applications.
• PyFreeBillingstars80 - Wholesale billing platform for Kamailio and FreeSWITCH.
• Getting Started With WebRTC - WebRTC tutorial by HTML5 Rocks.
• WebRTC Samples - Collection of samples demonstrating various parts of the WebRTC APIs.
• WebRTC Experiments - Comprehensive list of samples by Muaz Khan.
• Interactive Codelab - 30 minutes step by step live tutorial by Google.
• drachtio - Node.js SIP server framework.
• adapter.jsstars3.3k - JavaScript shim for abstracting WebRTC spec changes and inconsistencies.
• JsSIP - Lightweight open source JavaScript SIP library.
• sipML5 - Open source JavaScript SIP client with WebRTC media stack.
• simple-peerstars6.5k - WebRTC video, voice, and data channels abstraction for Node.js and the browser.
• Netfluxstars197 - Isomorphic JavaScript peer to peer transport API for client and server.
• PJSIP - Multi-protocol RTC library written in C.
• eXosip - eXtended osip is a mature C library for abstracting the SIP protocol.
• libdatachannelstars891 - Standalone WebRTC DataChannels C++ implementation.
• libSRTPstars988 - Secure Real-time Transport Protocol (SRTP) library for C.
• usrsctpstars533 - Portable Stream Control Transmission Protocol (SCTP) user-land stack.
• rawrtcstars348 - WebRTC and ORTC library with a small footprint.
• OSS Corestars21 - General purpose C++ library for Real Time Communications.
• Pion - Extensive software stack for WebRTC written in Go.
• gossipstars313 - SIP stack for stateful user agents written in Go.
• siprocketstars66 - Fast SIP and SDP packet parser.
• go-diameterstars211 - RFC compliant Diameter protocol library.
• aiortcstars3.1k - WebRTC and ORTC implementation for Python using asyncio.
• Kataristars29 - SIP stack application framework.
• NkSIPstars337 - Extendable SIP server framework.
• ersipstars112 - Library comprising building blocks for SIP applications.
• BlogGeekMe - Blog by Tsahi Levent-Levi with a strong focus on WebRTC.
• SIP Adventures - Unified communications blog by Andrew Prokop.
• WebRTCHacks - WebRTC blog by independent technologists.
• FreeSWITCH Slack - Join #freeswitch and #freeswitch-dev for user and developer support.
• discuss-webrtc - Developer oriented Google Group for WebRTC discussions.
• ClueCon - Annual conference held in Chicago for telecommunications developers. Birthplace of FreeSWITCH.
• Kamailio World - Berlin hosted annual event focused on Kamailio as well as VoIP, WebRTC, IMS, VoLTE and more.
• AstriCon - Asterisk focus event held every year across the US.
• Kranky Geek - AI and RTC event in San Francisco.
• eprstars894 - epub reader.
• Bible.Js CLIstars262 - Bible.
• SpeedReadstars57 - Spritz-alike speedreader.
• 👍 strstars234 - a modern, simple and consistent string manipulation library. MIT.
• trivial-extensible-sequencesstars10 - Portability library for the extensible sequences protocol (SBCL documentation). zlib.

• generic-clstars103 - Generic function interface to standard Common Lisp functions (equality, comparison, arithmetic, objects, iterator, sequences,…). MIT. See also the more lightweight generic-comparabilitystars13. LLGPL.
• cl21stars888 - An experimental project to move Common Lisp into the 21st century. Expat.

• clampstars68 - Arc language's brevity and conciseness to Common Lisp. Artistic License 2.0.
    • also arc-compatstars8 - Arc compatible package. Perl Foundation's Artistic Licence 2.0.
• cl-syntaxstars35 - Reader syntax conventions. LLGPL.
• cl-2dsyntax - An indentation-sensitive reader system. Not available on Quicklisp. Public domain.
• cl-annotstars124 - Python-like annotations for Common Lisp. LLGPL.
• cl-readerstars6 - A utility library
• ppathstars27 - Common Lisp's
• git-apistars19 - Common Lisp library
• CT. Category Theory. This library appears to be inspired by Haskell, Scala, or another functional language's library with a grounding in Category Theory.
• TS. Typescript. This library has typescript types.

• Ramdastars22.4k – A practical functional library for JavaScript that is designed specifically for a functional programming style. A style that makes it easy to create functional pipelines and never mutates user data. +TS.
• Folktale – A standard library for functional programming in JavaScript. Typescript support expected mid-2020. -TS.
• lodash/fp – An instance of Lodashstars54.6k with its methods wrapped to produce immutable, auto-curried, iteratee-first, data-last methods. +TS.
• 101stars1.6k – A modern and modular JavaScript utility library made to work well with vanilla JavaScript methods. -TS
• barely-functionalstars103 – A tiny (2.7kb) functional programming library using native ES5/6 operations. -TS.
• prelude.ls – A functionally oriented utility library somewhat based off of Haskell's Prelude module. -TS.
• preludejsstars93 - Hardcore Functional Programming for JavaScript. -TS.
• 1-linersstars785 – Functional tools that couldn’t be simpler. A dead simple functional utility belt, hand-crafted with love and attention. -TS.
• funfixstars631 – Funfix is a library of type classes and data types for Functional Programming in JavaScript, TypeScript and Flow. +CT, +TS.
• pico-lambdastars70 - Arrays, Strings and things the functional way. A 640b functional library based on native methods. -TS.
• pareto-jsstars263 - An extremely small, intuitive and fast functional utility library for JavaScript -TS.
• fpEsstars40 - A small library provides simple usages of basic FP & pattern-matching/sumtype & MonadIO/Rx & Optional for Javascript. -TS.
• Creed – Sophisticated and functionally-minded async with advanced features: coroutines, promises, ES2015 iterables, fantasy-land. -TS.
• TGridstars90 - Grid Computing Framework, Network & Thread extension of TSTLstars500, supporting RFC (Remote Function Call). +TS.
• Ferrumstars485 – Iterator library with support for objects as iterables, lazy evaulation andpipe(); implements Traits (from Rust)/Type Classes (from Haskell) in JS. -TS.
• iter-toolsstars134 - a rich toolset for working with iterables, both sync and async. +TS.
• remeda A function library roughly subsetting Ramda, but written in Typescript and thus more type-friendly. +TS.
• Immerstars23.8k – Immer is a tiny package for immutable state based on copy-on-write mechanism. +TS.
• DerivableJSstars512 – Functional Reactive State for JavaScript and TypeScript. DerivableJS enables you to make elegant declarative statements about how your bits of state are related. +TS.
• collectablestars257 – Super high-performance immutable data structures for modern JavaScript and TypeScript applications. +TS.
• prelude.tsstars356 - Immutable persistent collections, functional constructs such as Option and Either, and combinators. Implemented in Typescript but supports javascript too. +CT, +TS.
• TSTLstars500 - C++ STL (Standard Template Library) is implemented in TypeScript. STL Containers, iterators, algorithms and functors, that following functional programming rule, are provided. +TS.
• Sanctuarystars2.9k – Sanctuary makes it possible to write safe code without null checks. +CT, +TS.
• monet.js – A library that assists functional programming by providing a rich set of Monads and other useful functions. +CT, +TS.

• crocksstars1.5k – A collection of popular Algebraic Data Types with the main goal to curate and provide not only a common interface between each type, but also all of the helper functions needed to hit the ground running. -TS.
• purifystars1.2k - Functional programming library for TypeScript focusing on ADTs. +CT, +TS.
• Praticastars313 - Small, simple, easy FP data types for pragmatic and productive developers who need to ship reliable code fast. +CT, +TS.

• Tifi - Tifi is a library for functional programming in TypeScript. It solves a problem of the existence of both undefined and null. Tifi is inspired by the OCaml/Reason utilities for the option data type. +CT, +TS.
